name: Integrate an external API
description: Research, architect and implement a clean external API integration with proper error handling, TypeScript types and documentation.

steps.title: Research SDK and best practices
steps.prompt_template: Research {api} integration best practices for {stack}. Auth: {auth}.

steps.title: Design the integration layer
steps.prompt_template: Design the {api} integration layer. Define service class, error types, retry strategy.

steps.title: Validate integration quality
steps.prompt_template: Validate the {api} integration: no hardcoded credentials, error handling, TypeScript compliance.

command_template:
Integrate {api} into the project.

Purpose: {purpose} | Stack: {stack} | Auth: {auth}

1. SKILL-TECH-SEARCH → Research {api}: SDK vs HTTP client, rate limits, auth for {auth}, common failure modes.

2. SKILL-ARCHITECT-FIRST → Design: service class interface, error type hierarchy, retry strategy, TypeScript types.

3. Implement: service class, all credentials via env variables (never hardcoded), error handling for network errors/auth failures/rate limits.

4. SKILL-CHECKLIST-RUNNER → Validate: no exposed credentials, all error paths handled, TypeScript strict mode passing.
author: fluxrow
